title: 20Pcs Mini Plastic Skull Heads, Skeleton Skull Decorations, Halloween Decorations, Realistic Skull Decor for Terrarium, Fish Tank, Party Decor, Home Ornaments and Photo Props
features: 【Package Includes】You will receive 20 pieces of plastic skull heads, includes four distinct designs to enhance visual variety, sufficient quantity meet your different decorative needs, you can also share these little accessories with your friend and family members.

【High Quality】Our mini skulls are made of resin, which is sturdy and durable. The mini skull statues are realistic and look scary and funny. You can use them for Halloween decorations or making crafts.

【Realistic Skull Heads】The plastic skull head is very realistic and perfect for use as a prank prop, you can place it on the bed, table, food or other plate to scare your partner and family into making unforgettable Halloween memories.

【Enhanced Decorative Options】Mix and match four different skeleton styles to create dynamic arrangements; Useful as party favors, classroom projects, or collection displays; Stimulates creative expression in horror-themed setups.

【Versatile Decorative Use】Ideal for Halloween night, themed parties, and haunted house attractions, these miniature skulls can also be utilized in club decorations or as part of your year-round horror collection, making them a must-have for any spooky occasion.
